meta.title: B1 Review
meta.description: A comprehensive review of all B1 grammar topics and vocabulary.
meta.description_ko: B1 전체 문법 주제와 어휘 종합 복습.

explanation.en: 'Has just left' = present perfect with 'just' (no specific time mentioned).
explanation.ko: 'has just left' = 'just'를 사용한 현재 완료(특정 시간 없음).

questions.prompt: 현재 완료와 단순 과거 중 올바른 것은? (U01)

explanation.en: Past simple passive: 'was built' + specific year.
explanation.ko: 단순 과거 수동태: 'was built' + 특정 연도.

questions.prompt: The Eiffel Tower _____ in 1889. (에펠탑은 1889년에 건설됐습니다.) (U02)

explanation.en: Second conditional: 'If + past simple, would + base verb'. 'Were' for all persons.
explanation.ko: 2형 조건문: 'If + 과거 단순, would + 동사 원형'. 모든 인칭에 'were'.

questions.prompt: 올바른 2형 조건문은? (U03)
choices: If I will be rich, I will travel.
If I am rich, I would travel.
If I were rich, I would travel.
If I would be rich, I travel.

explanation.en: 'Should have + past participle' = regret/criticism about a past action.
explanation.ko: 'should have + 과거분사' = 과거 행동에 대한 후회/비판.

questions.prompt: You _____ have called before coming. We weren't home! (오기 전에 전화했어야 했어요. 집에 없었거든요!) (U04)

explanation.en: 'Lives' → 'lived' (tense backshift). 'Said' needs no object.

questions.prompt: 올바른 간접화법은? Direct: 'I live in Seoul.' (U05)
choices: She said she lives in Seoul.
She said she lived in Seoul.
She said she is living in Seoul.
She told she lived in Seoul.

explanation.en: 'That' for a defining relative clause referring to a person as subject.

questions.prompt: The woman _____ won the prize is my neighbour. (상을 받은 여성은 제 이웃입니다.) (U06)

explanation.en: 'Enjoy + gerund': 'enjoy swimming'.

questions.prompt: 'enjoy' 다음에 오는 형태는? (U07)

explanation.en: 'Decide' + '-sion' → 'decision' (noun form).

questions.prompt: 'decide' → _____ (명사형) (U08)

explanation.en: 'However' introduces an unexpected contrasting result.

questions.prompt: 빈칸에 알맞은 연결어는? 'She worked hard. _____, she didn't pass.' (U09)

explanation.en: 'In my opinion' is the fixed expression for giving personal views.
explanation.ko: 'in my opinion'은 개인 견해를 제시하는 고정 표현입니다.

questions.prompt: _____ my opinion, social media does more harm than good. (U10)

explanation.en: 'Cut down on' = reduce the amount of something.

questions.prompt: 건강 표현 'cut down on'의 의미는? (U11)

explanation.en: 'News' is uncountable → singular verb 'was'.

questions.prompt: 'The news _____ shocking.' — 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? (U12)

explanation.en: Culture shock = disorientation when suddenly experiencing an unfamiliar culture.
explanation.ko: culture shock = 낯선 문화를 갑자기 경험할 때의 혼란.

questions.prompt: 'culture shock'의 뜻은? (U13)
choices: 낯선 문화에 갑자기 접했을 때 느끼는 혼란

explanation.en: 'The number of + plural noun' takes a singular verb.
explanation.ko: 'The number of + 복수 명사'는 단수 동사를 취합니다.

questions.prompt: 'The number of trees _____ decreasing.' — 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? (U14)

explanation.en: 'Conduct' = 'carry out' in formal/scientific contexts.

questions.prompt: 'conduct an experiment'에서 'conduct'와 같은 의미의 단어는? (U15)

explanation.en: 'Exceeded expectations' = did better than expected.

questions.prompt: Sales have _____ our expectations by 30%. (판매량이 예상치를 30% 초과했습니다.) (U16)

explanation.en: Social mobility = ability to move between social classes.
explanation.ko: social mobility = 사회 계층 간에 이동할 수 있는 능력.

questions.prompt: 'social mobility'의 의미는? (U17)
choices: 개인이 사회 계층 간에 이동할 수 있는 능력

explanation.en: 'Convicted of' = found guilty in court.

questions.prompt: The suspect was _____ of fraud after a lengthy trial. (용의자는 긴 재판 끝에 사기죄로 유죄 판결을 받았습니다.) (U18)

explanation.en: Contractions are informal. Formal writing uses full forms: 'I am', 'do not'.
explanation.ko: 축약형은 비격식적입니다. 격식체에서는 완전한 형태를 씁니다.

questions.prompt: 격식체 글쓰기에서 피해야 하는 것은? (U19)

explanation.en: Present perfect passive: 'has been + past participle'.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요 (B1 종합).
questions.answer: The project has been completed successfully.

explanation.en: First conditional: 'If + present simple, will + base verb'.
explanation.ko: 1형 조건문: 'If + 현재 단순, will + 동사 원형'.

questions.prompt: 다음 중 올바른 문장은?
choices: If I will study harder, I'll pass.
If I study harder, I'll pass.
If I studied harder, I'll pass.
If I would study harder, I'll pass.

explanation.en: Reported question with backshift: 'come' → 'came'.

questions.prompt: She asked me where I _____ from. (그녀는 내가 어디서 왔는지 물었습니다.)

explanation.en: 'Despite' + noun/gerund. 'Although' + clause. 'Despite she was' is wrong.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'Despite she was tired, she finished the work.'

explanation.en: 'It is argued that' = impersonal passive reporting structure used in academic writing.
explanation.ko: 'it is argued that' = 학술 글쓰기에서 쓰는 비인칭 수동 보고 구조.

questions.prompt: 'It is argued that technology is changing education.' — 이 문장의 구조는?

explanation.en: Third conditional (If I had studied, I would have passed) is B2 level grammar.
explanation.ko: 3형 조건문(If I had studied, I would have passed)은 B2 수준 문법입니다.

questions.prompt: B1 레벨에서 배운 핵심 문법 항목으로 맞지 않는 것은?
